_comment: DOSM median MONTHLY household income (RM), national and by state, per Household Income Survey year — used to show each seat's median as a % of the national and state benchmark. Sourced from DOSM's Household Income Survey reports (2019 HIBAS, 2022, and 2024 released Oct 2025), corroborated via multiple independent search-result excerpts tied to the cited URLs (DOSM/news/CEIC) — direct page loads of DOSM are proxy-blocked in the build sandbox, hence CONFIRMED only where >=2 independent sources agreed, else PARTLY_CONFIRMED. Melaka carries no 2019 point here (only 2022/2024 could be sourced); Melaka seat income is a single 2020 estimate, so the app compares it to the nearest benchmark year common to national+state (2022) and labels that year. Re-verify against OpenDOSM hh_income_state before printing campaign material.
